name: petite-loutre
description: Ma Petite Loutre — tamagotchi pixel art en temps réel, PWA installable sur mobile

scripts.test: npm run test:sim && npm run test:dom
scripts.test:sim: node --test test/sim.test.js test/features.test.js test/battle.test.js test/polish.test.js test/story.test.js test/seasons.test.js test/toboggan.test.js test/items.test.js test/audio.test.js test/personality.test.js test/world.test.js test/gang.test.js test/seasonpass.test.js test/tilemap.test.js test/peche.test.js test/otter-art.test.js test/skills.test.js test/chasseur.test.js
